chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-4572 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). D/O matter 1. For orders on CMA No.9270/2026 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.9271/2026 (U/O-23, R-1). 3. For orders on CMA No.23538/2015 (Restoration)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.04.2026 Mr. Rashid, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. The petition, earlier was dismissed for non-prosecution on 12.05.2025, and is restored upon application; and, on request of the petitioner’s counsel, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn with liberty to approach the competent forum, subject to legal exceptions. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
